description_en: A monument (natural monument), the great cedar tree of Obira. It is a municipally designated natural monument of Midori City.

name_en: Enkū Buddha "Seated Statue in the Form of Yakushi Nyorai"
description_en: A tangible cultural property, an Enkū-style seated statue in the form of Yakushi Nyorai. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.
A tangible cultural property, the square-pillar Jizō stone image at Fukasawa. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.

name_romaji: Kirihara Gōgura Oyobi Kirihara Gōgura Monjo
name_en: Kirihara Communal Granary and Its Documents
description_en: A tangible cultural property comprising the Kirihara communal granary (gōgura) and its associated documents. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.

name_en: Main House of the Noguchi Family Residence
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the main house (omoya) of the Noguchi family residence. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.

name_romaji: Den Yamada-shi Oyobi Satomi Kyōdai no Haka
name_en: Reputed Graves of the Yamada Clan and the Satomi Brothers
description_en: A monument (historic site), the reputed graves of the Yamada clan and the Satomi brothers. It is a municipally designated historic site of Midori City.
A tangible cultural property comprising a hundred Kannon images at Asahara. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.
A tangible cultural property, the Nagame entertainment theater (yokyōjō). It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.
A folk cultural property, the Ōmama Gion festival. It is a municipally designated intangible folk cultural property of Midori City.
A tangible cultural property, the Iwaana Kannon (Rock-Cave Kannon). It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.

name_romaji: Iwaana Kannon no Jizō Bosatsu Zazō Oyobi Amida Nyorai Zazō
name_en: Seated Jizō and Seated Amida Statues of the Iwaana Kannon
description_en: A tangible cultural property comprising a seated statue of the bodhisattva Jizō and a seated statue of Amida Nyorai at the Iwaana Kannon. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.
A tangible cultural property, the former Ōmama Bank building. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.
A tangible cultural property, a stone five-storied pagoda. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.

name_en: Seated Statue of the Bodhisattva Jizō of Fumonji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a seated statue of the bodhisattva Jizō of Fumonji Temple. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.
A tangible cultural property, the Inari Shrine. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.
A tangible cultural property, the former Hanawa Elementary School building. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.
A monument (natural monument), the forest green tree frog (moriaogaeru). It is a municipally designated natural monument of Midori City.
A folk cultural property, the Konaka lion dance (shishimai). It is a municipally designated intangible folk cultural property of Midori City.
A monument (natural monument), the cluster cedar (muresugi) of Konaka. It is a municipally designated natural monument of Midori City.

name_en: Wooden Seated Statue of Yakushi Nyorai
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a wooden seated statue of Yakushi Nyorai (the Medicine Buddha). It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.

name_romaji: Tōnosawa no Sekizō Shaka Nehan Zō
name_en: Stone Reclining Shaka (Nirvana) Statue of Tōnosawa
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a stone reclining Shaka (nirvana) statue at Tōnosawa. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.
A tangible cultural property, the former Imaizumi family residence. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.

name_en: Wooden Standing Statue of the Eleven-Headed Kannon
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a wooden standing statue of the eleven-headed Kannon bodhisattva. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.

name_en: Seated Statue of Datsueba and Its Stone Niche
description_en: A tangible cultural property comprising a seated statue of Datsueba and its stone niche (sekigan). It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.
A tangible cultural property, the transom (ranma) carvings of Daisōin Temple. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.
A tangible cultural property, the Takakusagi family residence. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.
A tangible cultural property comprising historical materials relating to the Copper Highway (Dōkaidō). It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.
A tangible cultural property, the official copper storehouse (goyō dōgura). It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.
A monument (natural monument), the Kirishima azalea of Daisōin Temple. It is a municipally designated natural monument of Midori City.
A monument (historic site), the ruins of Goranda Castle. It is a municipally designated historic site of Midori City.
A tangible cultural property, the ruins of an air-defense watch post (bōkū kanshishō). It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.
A folk cultural property, the Little New Year (koshōgatsu) decorations of Sayado. It is a municipally designated intangible folk cultural property of Midori City.
A tangible cultural property, a hōkyōintō stone pagoda. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Midori City.

name_en: Stone Statue of the Bodhisattva Jizō
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the sculpture category, a stone statue of the bodhisattva Jizō. It is a town-designated important cultural property of Ōizumi Town, designated on 1979-11-30.

A tangible cultural property in the stone-object category, a stone stele (itabi) depicting the Amida triad. It is a town-designated important cultural property of Ōizumi Town, designated on 1979-11-30.

A tangible cultural property in the old-documents category, comprising 346 documents of the Shiraishi family. It is a town-designated important cultural property of Ōizumi Town, designated on 1983-12-01.

name_en: Main Hall and Carvings of Koizumi Shrine
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the buildings category, comprising the main hall (honden) of Koizumi Shrine and its carvings. It is a town-designated important cultural property of Ōizumi Town, designated on 1983-12-01.

name_en: Boiling-Water Ordeal Rite of Shanichi Inari Shrine
description_en: A folk cultural property, the kukatachi boiling-water ordeal rite of Shanichi Inari Shrine. It is a town-designated important intangible folk cultural property of Ōizumi Town, designated on 1979-11-30.
A folk cultural property, the Sengoku sasara dance. It is a town-designated important intangible folk cultural property of Ōizumi Town, designated on 1983-12-01.
A folk cultural property, the Yoshida Nishizato kagura sacred dance. It is a town-designated important intangible folk cultural property of Ōizumi Town, designated on 1984-10-12.
